name: Acute Senses
description: Add Blood Potency to sensory rolls; exceptional successes may cause Obsession.

name: Air of Menace
description: +2 to menace; others spend Willpower to pick fights. Social manoeuvring harder.

name: Alley Cat
description: Reduces threshold for exceptional success when prowling city streets.

name: Allies
description: Influence in a sphere. Call favours up to rating per chapter. Generates 1 influence at 3 dots, 2 at 5.

name: Altar
description: Contributors can teamwork Cruac rituals at an attuned altar, even without Cruac, at increased time cost.

name: Alternate Identity
description: Maintain one or more false identities.

name: Ambidextrous
description: Ignore penalties for using off-hand.

name: Anointed
description: Ordained priest; once per session roll Presence + Expression to preach Raptured Condition.

name: Anonymity
description: Harder to identify or find due to obscurity.

name: Area of Expertise
description: Raise one Specialty's die bonus to +2.

name: Army Of One
description: Roll Presence + Politics + Carthian Status to summon Carthian backup (1 per point per story).

name: Atrocious
description: 8-Again on monstrous Beast, lose 10-Again on seductive/competitive Beast.

name: Attaché
description: Retainers gain access to Invictus Status points distributed among Contacts, Resources, Safe Place.

name: Barfly
description: Skilled at making connections in nightlife and bars.

name: Beloved
description: Deep bond with a living Touchstone; +1 to resist detachment after spending time.

name: Bloodhound
description: Smell blood as if tasting it with Kindred Senses.

name: Body As Weapon
description: +1 bashing on unarmed strikes.

name: Breaking The Chains
description: Break blood bonds through collective Carthian feeding.

name: Cacophony Savvy
description: Knowledge of the Cacophony network grants information access.

name: Call The Beast
description: Use Animalism on revenants; contested by Resolve + Vitae.

name: Carthian Pull
description: Recognised for your influence in Carthian politics.

name: Casual User
description: Gain Carthian Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

name: Cease Fire
description: Force Willpower cost on all Discipline use in domain.

name: Cheap Shot
description: Dirty fighting and deception.

name: Choke Hold
description: Grappling to unconsciousness.

name: Chorister
description: Gain Crone Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

name: Claws Of The Unholy
description: In frenzy, Protean claws become +2 Aggravated (first success 2 Agg, subsequent 1 Bashing). Only ignores mundane armour.

name: Clipping
description: Ignore Wits damage when ramming.

name: Close Family
description: Blood sympathy stronger: +1 and 8-Again.

name: Closed Book
description: Hard to read, resistant to prying eyes.

name: Coda Against Sorcery
description: Penalise sorcery used against you.

name: Cohesive Unit
description: +2 teamwork. (••) bonus dice per scene. (•••) rerolls.

name: Common Sense
description: Once per session, ask the Storyteller for advice when stuck.

name: Contacts
description: Network of informants and professionals.

name: Court Jester
description: Reputation punishes official censure, stripping a point of City Status from opponents.

name: Covert Operative
description: Ambushes deny 10-Again to detect and grant +3 Initiative first turn.

name: Crowdsourcing
description: Spend Willpower and roll Manipulation + Academics to shift Social Merit points between Invictus.

name: Cutthroat
description: 8-Again on competitive Beast, lose 10-Again on monstrous/seductive Beast.

name: Danger Sense
description: +2 to notice ambushes or avoid surprise.

name: Defender
description: Bonus Willpower for protecting loved ones; losing them causes crisis.

name: Defensive Combat
description: Use Brawl or Weaponry instead of Athletics when calculating Defence.

name: Defensive Driving
description: Subtract Drive from vehicle attacks.

name: Demolisher
description: Can smash through barriers more effectively.

name: Devotion Experimenter
description: Reroll nines with Devotions; learn/teach them at an XP discount.

name: Direction Sense
description: Always know which way is north; strong innate sense of direction.

name: Distinguished Palate
description: Taste of Blood always exceptional; lose first Vitae if vessel lacks your delicacy.

name: Double Jointed
description: Flexible body grants +2 to escape restraints or contort.

name: Dream Visions
description: Once nightly, roll BP for prophetic dream answering a question.

name: Drift
description: No roll for high-speed turns.

name: Dynasty Membership
description: ST-granted dynasty membership. New Kid applies to any Kindred Status. Exemplar removed.

name: Eidetic Memory
description: Recall precise details of past events.

name: Empath
description: Wits + Empathy vs Manipulation + Subterfuge for mental state insight; can open Doors or ease breaking points.

name: Empower Judiciary
description: Grant legal authority to designated Kindred.

name: Encyclopaedic Knowledge
description: Broad general knowledge on many subjects.

name: Enticing
description: 8-Again on seductive Beast, lose 10-Again on monstrous/competitive Beast.

name: Esoteric Armoury
description: Enough esoterica to supply the banes of ephemeral entities with a Rank up to your rating in this Merit.

name: Establish Precedent
description: Lock legal rulings with supernatural enforcement.

name: Eye For The Strange
description: Intuition for the supernatural and occult.

name: Faith Militant
description: May draw upon Herd as Resources.

name: Fame
description: Recognised in mortal society; adds dice to relevant social rolls.

name: Feeding Grounds
description: Add dots to hunting rolls, starting Vitae, and predatory aura on territory. Allows Disciplines up to rating without risking dramatic failure on hunting rolls.

name: Fighting Finesse
description: Use Dexterity instead of Strength for fighting with this skill.

name: Finger On The Pulse
description: You are immersed in the Cacophony, and do not suffer the drawback of Cacophony Savvy.

name: Fixer
description: Arrange illegal services and contacts.

name: Fleet Of Foot
description: +1 Speed per point.

name: Flock
description: Inspire Herd; gain Willpower and extra Herd points equal to Flock points.

name: Friends In High Places
description: Once per chapter, use Invictus Status as Mortal Status in areas you don't possess. Other Invictus may be informed.

name: Fucking Thief
description: Steal flawed knowledge of a one-point covenant-restricted advantage.

name: Giant
description: Character is exceptionally tall/large; +1 Size.

name: Good Time Management
description: Gain an extra die on extended actions with clear planning.

name: Haven
description: Secure residence; may combine with Safe Place.

name: Heart Of Stone
description: Replace Touchstones with attachment to place or institution.

name: Herd
description: Provides one-for-one Vitae at start of game, no roll needed.

name: Hobbyist Clique
description: Group of fellow hobbyists; bonus when leveraging them.

name: Honey Trap
description: Drinking your blood restores Willpower and advances Vinculum.

name: Honey With Vinegar
description: You earn influence from Allies, Contacts, and wide Mortal Status one step lower than normal. 1 point of influence at 2 dots or 4 dots respectively.

name: I Know A Guy
description: Minor connections within the Carthians.

name: Independent Study
description: Gain Ordo Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

name: Indomitable
description: +2 to resist coercion or intimidation.

name: Information Network
description: Use your Contacts as Skill Specialties.

name: Inspiring
description: Boost allies' rolls with stirring words or presence.

name: Interdisciplinary Specialty
description: Apply Specialty across multiple Skills.

name: Invested
description: Distribute Invictus Status points into free Herd, Mentor, Resources, Retainer.

name: Iron Skin
description: Body conditioning against harm.

name: Iron Stamina
description: Ignore penalties from fatigue and wounds.

name: Iron Will
description: +2 to resist coercion or intimidation. Does not apply to supernatural influence.

name: Jack-booted Thug
description: Spend Willpower and roll Presence + Intimidation + City Status to shut people down with menace.

name: Kindred Status
description: General Kindred standing, tracked across City, Clan, and Covenant.

name: Kiss Of The Succubus
description: Feeding that causes Swooning also inflicts Addicted.

name: Laity
description: Gain Lancea Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

name: Language
description: Gain fluency in an additional language.

name: Lex Terrae
description: Punish poachers in feeding grounds

name: Library
description: Access to research resources, adds dice to rolls.

name: Lingering Dreams
description: Subjects share your prophetic dreams, inflicting Swooning.

name: Loaded For Bear
description: Gain extra reloads on weapons, including single shot weapons.

name: Lorekeeper
description: Lorehouse draws occultists; convert Library points into Retainer and Herd.

name: Major Domo
description: Operate an Elysium; +2 to social rolls when hospitality is secure.

name: Mandate From The Masses
description: Collectively drain enemy's Blood Potency

name: Mandragora Garden
description: An attuned ritual garden. Shareable domain merit. Contributors can use it as a fixed location for Crúac rituals; grants bonuses to ritual rolls equal to rating.

name: Married By Blood
description: Bond with Kindred Touchstone; pool Haven/Retainers, share Status loss.

name: Meditative Mind
description: Can enter deep meditation quickly; regain Willpower faster.

name: Mentor
description: Guidance from a mentor; use costs a downtime action. Generates 1 influence at 3 dots, 2 at 5.

name: Moderator
description: Use Invictus network admin access as temporary Allies, Contacts, or Library.

name: Mortal Status
description: Standing in a sphere. Adds dots to Social rolls within that group. Generates 1 influence at 3 dots, 2 at 5.

name: Mother-goddess' Altar
description: Lead Crúac rituals at an Altar at full speed.

name: Multilingual
description: Speak multiple languages fluently.

name: Mystery Cult Initiation
description: Membership in a cult; benefits depend on level.

name: Night Doctor Surgery
description: Access to illicit Carthian surgical services.

name: Noblesse Oblige
description: Use your City Status as a Touchstone.

name: Notary
description: Authority to officiate Oaths; immune to Status in social rolls

name: Oath Of Abstinence
description: No need to feed while maintaining oath

name: Oath Of Action
description: Gain Discipline from liege for difficult task

name: Oath Of Fealty
description: Once per week, create Vitae equal to Invictus Status

name: Oath Of Matrimony
description: Share capabilities with bonded partner

name: Oath Of Office
description: Role becomes additional Mask; substitute Status for WP

name: Oath Of Penance
description: Transfer 1/10 Vitae to liege; immune to their Disciplines

name: Oath Of Serfdom
description: Territory agreement; gain physical Discipline

name: Oath Of The Handshake Deal
description: Binding service with collateral penalty

name: Oath Of The Hard Motherfucker
description: Complete Oath by bringing a Carthian to torpor or Final Death, or assaulting a past violator of this Oath. Grants: first dot of Invictus Status, 1 free dot each of Allies, Contacts, and Resources (all pertaining to the new role), plus 9-again on two chosen Skills. The new Invictus is the vassal and must purchase the Merit; their new coterie is the liege. Betrayal strips the Merit and all associated advantages.

name: Oath Of The Model Prisoner
description: Protection while imprisoned

name: Oath Of The Refugee
description: Renounce citizenship; harder to pursue

name: Oath Of The Righteous Kill
description: Take on others' detachment burden

name: Oath Of The Safe Word
description: Both characters must enter willingly and purchase this Merit. Each offers one Social Merit they possess; the partner receives access to it (original retains use; mark both copies as half-dots, exempt from Sanctity of Merits). Both may access the other's Willpower pool as an extension of their own. Either may end the agreement at any time: the other loses Defence and all actions for 1 turn; the initiating character may extend this by spending Willpower (1 turn per point spent). One instance per character at a time.

name: Oath Of The Scapegoat
description: Member of the Order of Sir Martin; administered upon Nosferatu bloodline induction. Serves as Kindred Status for the Order at 1:1 (replaces Invictus Status; Sanctity of Merit applies to loss). Per dot: penalty on Invictus social actions where Covenant Status applies (excluding Internal Affairs office); equal bonus to remain unnoticed (including Obfuscate powers and Devotions), half that bonus rounded down for others. Each dot grants 2 free dots of Physical Fighting Styles. Duration: indefinite.

name: Oath Of The True Knight
description: Defend Invictus while neutral; Status as armour

name: Object Fetishism
description: Obsess over a possession for a Specialty. Regain Willpower each session; Willpower on that Specialty exaggerates success and failure.

name: One Foot In The Door
description: Gain Invictus Status 1 benefits; once per story call a small favour.

name: Opening The Void
description: Summons shadow-beast entities as servants

name: Pack Alpha
description: Gangrel mark a pack; teamwork rolls gain 8-Again, but failure risks Willpower.

name: Patient
description: +2 to extended actions requiring patience.

name: Peacemaker
description: Spend Willpower to negotiate peace via Social Manoeuvring. (•••) can talk down supernatural rages.

name: Picket Line
description: Each chapter, you have a pool of dots equal to their Contacts (max 5), which can be applied to Allies separately or as one amount, to raise their effective level when taking the Social Merit Blocking action.

name: Plausible Deniability
description: Evade supernatural guilt detection

name: Prestigious Sire
description: Use your sire's vampiric Status in place of your own in Social actions.

name: Primal Creation
description: Stimulates growth and fertility; can force cloning

name: Professional Training
description: Structured professional background grants Skill and asset benefits.

name: Punch Drunk
description: Spend Willpower to preserve your last Health point, upgrading preexisting damage instead.

name: Pusher
description: +2 to persuade others into bad ideas or vices.

name: Quick Draw
description: Draw or ready weapon as reflexive action.

name: Receptive Mind
description: Add extra target per point when using Lay Open the Mind.

name: Relentless
description: Push past limits; +2 to rolls when enduring hardship.

name: Resources
description: Wealth and disposable income.

name: Retainer
description: Loyal assistant or follower.

name: Revenant Impostor
description: May replace Alternate Identity; masquerade as revenant.

name: Right Of Return
description: Hold multiple covenant statuses

name: Safe Place
description: Secure, defensible location.

name: Sanctuary
description: Authority to shelter one Kindred criminal per point; they act as Retainers if fed.

name: Savior Of The Lost
description: Replace Humanity cost to uplift revenants with detachment roll (spend WP point).

name: Secret Society Junkie
description: Status or Mystery Cult points in human societies also count as Herd.

name: Sell Out
description: Manipulate titles to gain benefits of one point of Status in each covenant; may count as Carthian.

name: Shiv
description: Concealed weapon expertise

name: Sleight Of Hand
description: +2 to conceal or manipulate small objects.

name: Small Unit Tactics
description: Coordinate allies in combat for bonuses.

name: Smooth Criminal
description: Once per story, roll Manipulation + Subterfuge to end allegations against you or fellow Carthian.

name: Social Engineering
description: Spend Willpower + roll Manipulation + Investigation to find weaknesses/openings.

name: Sorcerous Eunuch
description: Sorcery scoured from you; penalize sorcerous effects with Resolve; can't learn blood sorcery.

name: Speaker For The Silent
description: Channel the will of a torpid elder; can sever with Willpower.

name: Special Treat
description: Keep ghoul with addictive blood; costs extra Vitae upkeep.

name: Speed Demon
description: +10 Speed per success instead of +5

name: Staff
description: Crew of workers with one auto-success on chosen Skill. Generates 1 influence at 3 dots, 2 at 5.

name: Stigmata
description: Weekly or by WP bleed Vitae equal to points; Vitae inspires spiritually, fuels Theban Sorcery, and Willpower.

name: Strength Of Resolution
description: Resist coercion to break laws

name: Striking Looks
description: Exceptional appearance grants bonuses (or penalties).

name: Support Network
description: Spend Willpower on supportive ties to add dots to breaking point rolls.

name: Survivalist
description: Resist Extreme Cold/Heat for Stamina hours.

name: Swarm Form
description: With Protean, turn into a swarm; attacks ignore Defense, deal lethal.

name: Sympathetic
description: People find it easy to confide in you; +2 to Empathy.

name: Table Turner
description: Reverse power dynamics in tense social encounters.

name: Taste
description: Recognized aesthetic or creative sense.

name: Tech-savvy
description: Access devices of Availability +2; assign points among equipment bonus, Structure, Durability.

name: The Mother-daughter Bond
description: When purchasing Mentor, take additional dots in a chosen Crúac Style (Unbridled Chaos, Primal Creation, or Opening the Void) equal to Mentor rating. If Mentor exceeds Crúac, Style dots are added as Crúac is gained. If you already have the Style, XP is refunded.

name: Three Heads Of Kerberos
description: Choose one Aspect (Monstrous, Competitive, or Seductive) when purchasing. May be taken up to three times, each for a different Aspect. Honing (•): Add Merit dots to lash out with the chosen Aspect. Internalizing (••): Voluntarily take the Aspect's Condition (Bestial / Competitive / Wanton) to resolve it for Beats. Cowing (•••): When successfully applying Predatory Aura, forego the normal Condition and apply a variant Subservient Condition fitting the Aspect instead. Striking (••••): Spend 1 WP to lash out reflexively while simultaneously affecting the victim with another action. The Fires of Hell (•••••): When lashing out, choose additional victims equal to Blood Potency — each must fight-or-flight against your successes.

name: Tolerance For Biology
description: Comfortable with unsettling biological details.

name: Toss That Shit Right Back
description: When you dodge a thrown attack, catch it and immediately throw it back.

name: Touchstone
description: Gain an extra Touchstone per point; each ties to a Humanity step.

name: Trained Observer
description: Perception rolls gain 9-again at one dot, 8-again at three dots.

name: Travel Agent
description: Name a host in a new domain; gain temp Allies/Contacts equal to half points; harder to intercept travel.

name: Trigger Discipline
description: Increase a firearm's effective capacity, or allow an additional long burst at high capacity.

name: True Fiend
description: Terrifying presence; +3 to Intimidation.

name: Unassuming Guise
description: +3 to appear unremarkable or human.

name: Unbridled Chaos
description: Warps reality; alters Structure/Durability and weather

name: Undead Menses
description: Produce blood that boosts Crúac rituals or weakens resistance to Disciplines.

name: Unsettling Gaze
description: Exceptional success with monstrous Beast inflicts breaking point on victim.

name: Viral Mythology
description: Show of divine glory inflicts awe; Herd and Allies Merits double yield.

name: Weaponise Dissent
description: City Status holders take extra damage

name: What You've Done For Her Lately
description: Once per story, Crúac rite boosts effective Crone Status for the scene.

name: Where The Bodies Are Buried
description: Once per story per point, your notes can dig up dirt on a vampire you know.

name: Whipping Boy
description: Gain an additional Dirge: The Whipping Boy. Regain a point of Willpower when serving another vampire earns ostracism, ridicule, or distrust. Regain all spent Willpower on a breaking point suffered in service.

name: Wicked Jaws
description: Violent bite deals 2L or +1L if other bonuses apply.
